login.title: Connect to %s Roaming
login.subtitle: Sign in with your %s account to connect
login.email.label: Account
login.guest.hint: Enter the guest code provided by your administrator
login.guest.label: Guest code
login.guest.invalid: Invalid guest code. Please double-check and retry.
errors.invalidDomain: Account not allowed. Use an allowed account.
errors.accountDenied: This account is denied by admin. Please contact your administrator.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a bit and try again.
errors.rateLimitedRetry: Too many attempts. Please try again in %s.
errors.rateLimitedPermanent: This connection has been blocked after repeated security violations. Please contact your administrator.
errors.notAuthorized: This account is not authorized. Please contact your admin.
errors.guestBlocked: Sorry, external guest accounts are not allowed to connect to WiFi.
errors.sessionLost: Session lost. Please reopen the login page from your WiFi dialog.
errors.expired: Sign-in timed out. Please try again.
errors.title: Connection Failed
errors.generic: Could not complete authentication. Please try again later or contact your admin.
errors.notAdminMember: Your account is not on the admin list. Please contact your administrator.
misc.successMsg: You are now connected to %s. This session is valid for 8 hours.
